name: HWR_CTL_RSLT_TYP_MAP_B
description: This table is for types mapping (just like Xref table)

columns.Name: TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the Id indicating the type of the post-control record

columns.Name: TYPE_NAME
columns.Comments: The column is the name of the post-control record

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This column is for the description of the post-control record

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION_DETAIL
columns.Comments: This column is for the additional details of any about the post-control record (like what tables are using it, etc)

columns.Name: TYPE_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: This column is for the type attribute 1

columns.Name: TYPE_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: This column is for type attribute 2

columns.Name: TYPE_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: This column is for type attribute 3

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
